raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Paklaufi mann KUNGS/ 
paklaufi mann/ ka ſchee Laudis 
atſihſt / ka tu KUNGS tas 
Deews eſti/ ka tu winnu Sirdi 
pehz warri atgreest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad kritte ta KUNGA 
Ugguns femmê / un aprihje to 
Dedsamo-Uppuri/ un to Malku/ 
un tohs Akminus / un tohs 
Pihſchlus/ un uſlaisija arri to 
Uhdeni eekſch Bedres.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad un wiſſi Laudis to 
redſeja/ tad mettehs tee us fawu 
Waigu/ un fazzija : Tas KUNGS 
irr Deews/ tas KUNGS irr 
Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Elijas fazzija us teem: 
Grahbeet Baala Praweeschus 
Rohkå/ ka ne weens no teem iſ- 
spruhk/ tad ſagrahbe tee tohs. 
Un Elijas nowedde tohs pee Ki- 
ſona Uppes/ un nokawe tohs tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Elijas us A- 
kabu : Zellees/ ehd un dserr / jo 
tas ta ruhz/ ittin ka gribbetu tas 
stipri liht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta zehlehs Akabs us aug- 
schu ehſt un dsert / bet Elijas 
gahje us to Wirs-Gallu ta Kar- 
meta Kalna / un noleezahs pee 
Semmes/ un likke fawu Waigu 
ſtarp fawem Jetfeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſch fazzija us fa- 
wu Puuſi : Eij jelle augſcham/ 
un ſkattajs prett to Juhras Jet-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un feptita Reife fazzij 
wiſsch: Raugi/ weena masa Pe 
debbes/ ka weena Wihra Plau 
ſte / uskahpj no Juhras. Ta 
fazzija wiſsch : Eij augſcham 
fakki Akabam : Eejuhds/ un ai 
branz/ ka Leetus tew ne aisxeii
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tik ilgi tas notiffahe 
ka ta Debbes apmahzahs no Pe 
debbescheem/ un Wehja/ un na 
ze ftiprs Leetus. Un Akabs ai 
branz/ un nahze us Jesreëlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Roh 
nahze pahr Elijafu/ un tas apjo 
se fawus Gurnus/ un tezzeja D 
kabam papreekschu/ teckains t 
us Jesreëlu nahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XIX. Nodalla. 
Elijas behg preekſch Iſebeles/ un nahk Tu 
neſi : 4 Tohp no Engela ehvinahts : 6. 
no Deewa eeprrezinahts : 11. Tohp arri 
Asaēa fuhthts/to paschu par Lehniu po 
Eihriju fwaidiht : 15. Ka arri Jeü 
Lehnieru pahr Israëlu : 16. Un to Eliu 
Praweetu : 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N Akabs teize Iſebe 
wiſſn/ ko Elijas bij da 
rijs/ un wiſſn/ ka wiſſ 
tohs Praweeschus ar Sohbir 
bij nokawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija Iſebele wee 
Wehſtnesi pee Elijasu/ un lik 
faziht : Laid tee Deewi man fel 
un ta darra/ ja es riht ap fc 
Laiku tawai Dwehfelet ta ne da 
ru/ ka weennai no winna Dwe 
felehin.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
